title: Accounting Review
description: Commerce v1 accounting review contract used to confirm or reject payment/reference matches for bank transfer and revenue verification boundaries.
$comment: Sources: TECH-04 requires Accounting Review for direct bank transfer confirmation and mismatch handling. TODO: source documents do not define reviewer workflow states in detail.

bank_transfer_id.description: Bank transfer under review, if applicable.

review_status.description: Review status. Prefer enums/commerce/payment-status.yaml values such as PAYMENT_REVIEW, PAYMENT_CONFIRMED, PAYMENT_AMOUNT_MISMATCH, PAYMENT_REFERENCE_MISMATCH.

reference_matched.description: Whether payment reference matches expected reference.
